behavior_summary: Services the 'U8P_NSRUNWOD::look' (examine) event for a wood item: when the object is inspected, the routine prepares a safe per-call context and delegates to the item's bark routine to produce the visible description.

The handler constructs/passes the literal string "wood " to Item::bark along with the item/process pointer, treats Item::bark's return as its own result, frees the temporary string, and then suspends/returns.
Per-call/process-exclude semantics are applied before invoking the bark method (inferred: prevents reentrancy or establishes caller context).
notable_control_flow: Entry triggered by the 'U8P_NSRUNWOD::look' event for the item; sets up call-related info and applies process-exclude/pid semantics prior to calling Item::bark (inferred protective/context setup).
Pushes the item pointer (parameter) and the literal "wood ", converts/passes the string pointer to Item::bark, then frees that temporary string after the call.
The return value from Item::bark is propagated as this function's return value; a small temporary is popped after an 'implies' sequence before the script suspends/returns.
open_questions: Exact engine semantics and numeric id(s) of the 'set info' / 'process-exclude' operations used prior to calling Item::bark (only the general effect is inferred).
Whether the process-exclude semantics affect only this item instance or also modify a target/process referenced indirectly by the item (inference based on operand patterns).
Whether Item::bark performs any side effects beyond producing text for the viewer (e.g., logging, reputation, or state changes) — not visible in this excerpt.

main_function.name: U8P_NSRUNWOD::look
main_function.purpose: Handle the 'U8P_NSRUNWOD::look' event for the wood object by delegating to Item::bark with the literal "wood ", returning that call's result.
entry_conditions: Event 0 (U8P_NSRUNWOD::look) — invoked when the Avatar or relevant actor examines/looks at this item.
Function executes when the item's U8P_NSRUNWOD::look handler is triggered; sets per-call info and applies process-exclude/pid setup before delegating.

function_map.name: U8P_NSRUNWOD::look
function_map.role: Look/inspect event handler for the wood item; prepares context and delegates to Item::bark.

function_map.name: Item::bark
function_map.role: Engine/item routine used to emit/display short descriptive text or 'bark' behavior for an item when called with a target process/object and a string.

external_calls.purpose: Request the item/process to emit/display its short description/message using the provided literal string "wood ". The bark return value is used as this function's return.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: Services the 'U8P_NSRUNWOD::look' (examine) event for a wood item: when the object is inspected, the routine prepares a safe per-call context and delegates to the item's bark routine to produce the visible description.
